chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2762 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on Nazir report dated 07.05.2021 2. For hearing of CMA No.11933/2021 3. For hearing of main case 25.03.2025 Mr. Kashif Hanif, advocate for the petitioner Syed Zaeem Hyder, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General It is jointly stated that this petition is squarely covered by the Division Bench judgment of this Court in the case of Bilquees Khalid and another vs. Federation of Pakistan and another reported as 2022 CLC 2002, therefore, in reliance upon the ratio therein may be disposed off upon the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
